description: Address review findings: fix updatedAt timestamp, add retry on terminal states, add condition expression comment for PutItem collision prevention.
steps: Step 1 - Fix updatedAt in MarkCompleted and MarkFailed to use $$.State.EnteredTime instead of $.time
Step 2 - Add retry configuration (Interval 2s, MaxAttempts 3, BackoffRate 2.0, Errors States.ALL) on both MarkCompleted and MarkFailed tasks
Step 3 - Investigate if CDK L2 DynamoPutItem supports ConditionExpression; if not, add a code comment documenting the limitation
Step 4 - Run tests and cdk synth to verify
acceptance_criteria: MarkCompleted and MarkFailed use $$.State.EnteredTime for updatedAt
MarkCompleted and MarkFailed have retry configuration
PutItem collision limitation is documented if CDK does not support ConditionExpression
findings: All 3 review issues addressed: (1) updatedAt uses $$.State.EnteredTime for actual completion/failure time, (2) AddRetry with States.ALL, interval 2s, maxAttempts 3, backoffRate 2.0 added to both MarkCompleted and MarkFailed, (3) CDK L2 DynamoPutItem does support ConditionExpression - added conditional write to prevent overwriting in-flight records.
